mapper.select: SELECT user_id, from_email, smtp_host, smtp_port, smtp_password_enc, use_ssl, created_at, updated_at FROM user_mail_config WHERE user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid)
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_mail_config (user_id, from_email, smtp_host, smtp_port, smtp_password_enc, use_ssl, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (CAST(#{userId} AS uuid), #{fromEmail}, #{smtpHost}, #{smtpPort}, #{smtpPasswordEnc}, #{useSsl}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE user_mail_config SET from_email = #{fromEmail}, smtp_host = #{smtpHost}, smtp_port = #{smtpPort}, smtp_password_enc = #{smtpPasswordEnc}, use_ssl = #{useSsl}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid)
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM user_mail_config WHERE user_id = CAST(#{userId} AS uuid)
